## BaseIdTogglePanel.emitStateEvent() method

Emits the [XEventsTypes.TogglePanelStateChanged](./x-components.xeventstypes.togglepanelstatechanged.md) event, when the internal state changes.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
emitStateEvent(): void;
```
<b>Returns:</b>

void

## Remarks

This event is necessary to link the state with the [BaseIdTogglePanelButton](./x-components.baseidtogglepanelbutton.md) component.
